name: Fused Seal of the Forsaken
description: Ancient scrolls describe this as the 'Eye of the Void.' It was meant to watch over the boundary between worlds, but it turns out the Void is mostly just empty space and occasional dust bunnies. Still, the view is great.
dropLocations: Forsaken Temple, PureStrategy, Massacre, Wave 25, Rifted
Forsaken Temple, PureStrategy, Massacre, Wave 15, Rifted
